untranslatable_reason: Two-leg decline pattern requires multi-bar price measurement and projection (first leg decline measured in dollars, then projected downward from corrective phase top). Indicator-based conditions cannot precisely replicate the geometric projection logic of measuring first leg decline and projecting it as a target level. The pattern relies on absolute price measurements across multiple swing highs/lows rather than indicator thresholds. Entry conditions converted based on lower lows and trend direction, but exit targets (35-39% or 83% success rates) cannot be expressed as standard indicator conditions without custom multi-bar memory logic.
